Flow.description: Displays a summary of the funding award on the grant recipient portal on the project summary page
Flow.label: DESNZ - Award Summary Display

fields.name: Homes_Detail_Summary
fields.fieldText: Application Details

fields.fieldText: No. Of Homes Accessing the Off-Gas Grid LCH Uplift

fields.fieldText: No. Of Homes To EPC C 26/27
